title: CUET PG Exam Date Sheet 2025 (Out) @ exams.nta.ac.in National Testing Agency

detail.title: CUET PG Exam Date Sheet 2025 (Out) @ exams.nta.ac.in National Testing Agency
detail.short_info: National Testing Agency (NTA) has released the PG. Students can access their CUET Result 2025 using their registration number through the direct link here.

sections.heading: CUET PG Exam Date Sheet 2025 (Out) @ exams.nta.ac.in National Testing Agency

content.text: National Testing Agency fficials have released National Testing Agency (NTA) Exam Date Sheet 2025. Furthermore, the CUET PG Date Sheet 2025 for Common University Entrance Test was announced 13-03-2025 to 01-04-2025 by the administration.

National Testing Agency Exam Schedule 2025 may be found by clicking on the link at the bottom of the page. All candidates should keep in mind that as National Testing Agency Sem Exam Date Sheet 2025 is released, we will update the links.

sections.heading: Important Details CUET PG Date Sheet 2025
How to Download the CUET PG Date Sheet 2025?

content.text: Candidates follow the steps to download National Testing Agency Date Sheet 2025, candidates check the details and download it easily.

items: The examination Schedules page will pop up
Date Sheet for different courses will show up for Regular and Regular / External.
